value.stringValue: Custom notification type not found for configured developer name.
Manager recipient unresolved; skipping custom notification and continuing to high-value audit.
Bank_CRM_Settings.Default was not found. Failing closed per production policy.

Flow.description: F1 Part C: After-save on LoanRequest__c status change. Updates customer status on Approve/Reject; on high-value status changes sends manager custom notification and creates HIGH_VALUE_STATUS_REVIEW audit. Does not create Tasks or STATUS_CHANGED audits (Apex-owned). Deployed inactive until Flow tests pass.
Flow.label: Loan Request Status Changed

recordCreates.name: CRT_High_Value_Status_Audit
recordCreates.label: Create High Value Status Review Audit

value.stringValue: High-value loan status changed; manager notification path attempted.

textTemplates.name: ttNotificationBody
textTemplates.text: High-value loan {!$Record.Name} changed status to {!$Record.LoanStatus__c}. Amount: {!$Record.LoanAmount__c}.
